seoTitle: Bentleigh vs Bentleigh East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bentleigh and Bentleigh East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bentleigh vs Bentleigh East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bentleigh and Bentleigh East.
heading: Bentleigh vs Bentleigh East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bentleigh, Victoria and Bentleigh East, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bentleigh East has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Bentleigh (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bentleigh or Bentleigh East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bentleigh has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Bentleigh East scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bentleigh scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Bentleigh East scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bentleigh or Bentleigh East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bentleigh East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
